data.description: FUTURE MIGRATION — out of contract 9f72697 scope (no AC IDs). Origin: Dependabot PR #54 (biome 1.9.4->2.5.3) bulk-merged 2026-07-10, broke main, reverted in PR #63. Observed breakage: npm run lint broken — 2.x CLI rejects the unmigrated 1.x biome.json (verified by MA-29 delegator). Scope: bump @biomejs/biome to current 2.x, run biome migrate to convert biome.json, reconcile any renamed/removed rules against the MA-5 lint baseline, review the reformat diff (2.x formatter defaults shifted) as a separate style-only commit if large. Gates: npm run lint green locally AND in the CI lint step (MA-5 wiring); fast suite green (npm test); no functional diffs mixed into the reformat commit. Serialization: package.json (falcon-detective) group — collides with the TypeScript 7 migration ticket; one in flight at a time. Size: S.
data.title: Migrate Biome 1.9 to 2.x config and CLI in falcon-detective

provenance.reason: Operator-requested minting of future tickets for the three majors reverted in PR #63
MA-32 picked up in operator-initiated ma30-32 worktree session; plan = ticket description (mint-time scope+gates)
Biome 2.5.3 migration underway on claude/ma-32-biome-2x; MA-31 held per package.json serialization

data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/68 (head 1ae89d1, base main). Biome 1.9.4 -> 2.5.3; biome migrate config conversion (files.includes negations, assist.actions organizeImports, rules.preset), MA-5 rule-offs preserved; style-only second commit for mechanical autofixes (import sorting x5, processIssues.ts format drift, dead zodToJsonSchema import removal — newly flagged by 2.x recommended). Gates: npm run lint clean (CI lint step runs the same invocation); npm test 152/152. Note: zod-to-json-schema dep now unreferenced, left in place (out of ticket scope). MA-31 stacked on this branch per package.json serialization.

provenance.reason: All ticket gates green; PR #68 awaiting operator merge (terminal pre-merge status per run config)

data.body: Merged (PR #68, operator-authorized merge commit 6f373a2, mergedAt 2026-07-11T07:49:27Z). falcon-detective now on Biome 2.5.3; both CI jobs green on the PR head (Rust fmt+clippy+test; TypeScript build+test incl. E2E_REQUIRED cassette replay — confirms the fingerprint re-sync holds and cassette keys are stable). Replaces reverted Dependabot PR #54 / revert PR #63.

provenance.reason: Operator instructed merge of PR #68; MA-32 complete, CI green both jobs
